site.title: Neft Teacher App Library
site.eyebrow: Neft Teacher · One Cloudflare Pages Hub
site.description: A single Cloudflare Pages deployment for interactive classroom apps, student practice tools, reading supports, and family learning resources.

apps.title: Hebrew Reading Practice
apps.description: High-engagement Hebrew reading and vocabulary practice for Noam, organized as a reusable learning app.

apps.title: Volume of Rectangular Prisms
apps.description: Interactive volume practice for rectangular prisms with student-friendly visuals and practice routines.

apps.title: Interactive Area Mission
apps.description: A visual area mission for polygons, formulas, and applied geometry practice.

apps.title: Grade 6 Area 5.1–5.2
apps.description: Area lesson support and practice for Grade 6 Unit 5.1–5.2.

apps.title: Grade 6 Area Language Support
apps.description: Language-supported version of Grade 6 area practice for multilingual learners.

apps.title: Parallelogram and Rhombus Game
apps.description: Interactive practice for parallelogram and rhombus area reasoning.

apps.title: 6.EE.C.9 Review Activities
apps.description: Review activities for independent/dependent variables and equation relationships.

apps.title: 6.EE.C.9 Game
apps.description: Game-based practice for 6.EE.C.9 function and relationship thinking.

apps.title: Variable Explorer ESOL
apps.description: ESOL-accessible variable exploration and relationship practice.

apps.title: Variable Explorer
apps.description: Interactive variable exploration for understanding input/output relationships.

apps.title: Data Detective Game
apps.description: Statistics practice through a data detective game format.

apps.title: 6.SP.B.5 Interactive Review
apps.description: Interactive review for summarizing and describing distributions.

apps.title: Decimal Operations Review
apps.description: Interactive decimal operations review and practice.

apps.title: Long Division MCAP Review
apps.description: Long division review built for MCAP-style preparation.

apps.title: Math Unit 4 Interactive Study Studio
apps.description: Interactive study studio for Grade 6 Unit 4 review.
